review_status.notes: All internal content, structure, continuity, rendering, browser, proof, evidence, rights, tested-artifact, archive, public-redownload, and attestation gates passed. No external-human prepublication review was requested or claimed.

release_notes: The ASI Stack v2.1.0 evidence release preserves three preregistered post-v2 empirical programs, nine chapter-core no-change decisions, three accepted non-core blocks-promotion transitions, nine reconciled chapters, updated evidence vectors, residuals, and conditional deferrals. No chapter-core support state is promoted. The exact tagged source, CI-tested bundle, deployed site, immutable site archive, citation metadata, and conditional path-level license snapshot are bound to commit cb3b86051c3f4bd82e8b3128c0fdf180e8a7cfa5. Tag-bound rights-routing snapshot SHA-256: eef3410f1e409122aeaede80d5fd658c09650e793c485980212b2398241b237d.
residuals: All 54 chapter-core claims remain at argument support; this release creates no support-state promotion.
The post-v2 residual ledger retains fourteen lanes, including three infrastructure-conditional deferrals.
The live root and /latest/ channels are mutable; the GitHub Release archive is the immutable v2.1.0 rendered-site artifact.
EPUB, DOCX, PDF, audio, and curated-reader editions remain outside this release.
No external-human prepublication review, independent audit, DOI, or external peer review is claimed.
non_claims: does not prove ASI or AGI capability, production readiness, deployment safety, economic value, or universal governance correctness
does not promote any chapter-core claim above its recorded evidence state
does not generalize three bounded empirical programs to open-world or production behavior
does not claim released EPUB, DOCX, PDF, audio, or curated-reader artifacts
does not claim independent legal review, third-party ownership clearance, external audit, or external-human peer review
